overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA: San Andreas Definitive Edition showing the protagonist CJ running through the Santa Maria Beach area of Los Santos. The clip begins in an urban plaza near a skate park, transitions onto city streets with light traffic, and ends at the beachfront during a sunset that shifts the lighting from afternoon to golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with skate park ramps and modern architecture

agents.ego_description: sprinting through the open plaza area toward the skate park, maintaining a steady pace along the curved pathway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking across the plaza path

entered.detail: large contemporary building with dark glass facade dominating the right side of the plaza
concrete skateboarding ramps and bowls visible in the plaza area
tall palm trees lining the plaza and background
high-rise buildings visible in the downtown skyline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit urban plaza with CJ running along a curved concrete path. A modern black building stands prominently on the right while skate park ramps occupy the left side. Sparse pedestrians are scattered throughout the open area as CJ maintains a steady running pace toward an overpass in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with vehicle traffic and pedestrian sidewalks

events.description: exits the open plaza and passes underneath the overpass structure
turns right onto the main street, changing direction from north to east
weaves through pedestrians while cars pass by on the adjacent road

agents.ego_description: sprinting under the overpass and turning onto the street, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk
pedestrian in black outfit walking toward CJ on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass creating partial cover overhead
multi-story commercial building with blue facade and signage
paved city street with lane markings and vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: CJ transitions from the plaza by running under a highway overpass, briefly entering a shaded area before emerging onto a busy city street. The environment shifts to asphalt roads with moving vehicle traffic and increased pedestrian density. A yellow taxi passes by on the left as CJ continues running along the sidewalk next to a blue commercial building.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront promenade and sandy beach at sunset

events.description: steps off the street and onto the sandy beach area, entering the waterfront zone
sunset creates golden hour lighting with pink and orange hues in the sky

agents.ego_description: slowing to a walk along the beachfront, passing outdoor seating areas, then stopping to observe the ocean view

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt standing near the green beach umbrellas

entered.detail: beachfront building with 'SON OF A BEACH' signage painted on the wall
large green umbrellas shading outdoor tables and seating
open view of the ocean and horizon with the sun setting
distant pier extending into the water

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to the beachfront as CJ leaves the street and enters the sandy beach area. The 'Son of a Beach' building marks the entrance to the waterfront zone, where green umbrellas shade outdoor seating. The lighting shifts to golden hour with a pink sunset sky as CJ approaches the ocean overlook, with the pier visible in the distance and palm trees silhouetted against the evening light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the protagonist runs from a bright urban plaza through city streets and finally onto a sunset-drenched beach. It begins on a curved concrete path in a sunlit plaza, passing by skate park ramps and a modern black building while heading toward a distant overpass. As the camera follows the runner under the shaded highway overpass, the scene shifts to a busy asphalt street filled with moving vehicle traffic, pedestrians, and blue commercial buildings. The environment then opens up as the runner leaves the city pavement and enters the sandy beachfront, passing the Son of a Beach building and green outdoor umbrellas. Finally, the lighting transforms into a warm golden hour with a pink sunset sky as the camera approaches the ocean overlook, with palm trees and a distant pier silhouetted against the evening light.
